## Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is this change needed? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new component
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Styling / UI change
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Configuration / build change

## Related issue / ticket
<!-- Link to Jira/Azure DevOps ticket or GitHub issue -->

## Testing
- [ ] Unit / component tests added or updated
- [ ] Vitest coverage passing (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Tested in browser locally (`npm run dev`)
- [ ] Accessibility checked (keyboard nav, ARIA)

## Checklist
- [ ] No `^` or `~` in package.json dependency versions
- [ ] `package-lock.json` updated (`npm ci` used, not `npm install`)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or environment-specific values
- [ ] Protected routes / RBAC rules respected
- [ ] No console errors or warnings in browser
